## Summary

Describe the change at a high level and why it exists.

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

_Put an `x` in the boxes that apply._

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Maintenance / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation / content
- [ ] Breaking change

## Details

Call out the important implementation details, tradeoffs, or areas reviewers should focus on.
Include screenshots or a short recording for visible UI changes.

## Validation

_Put an `x` in the boxes that apply._

- [ ] Built the app locally
- [ ] Unit tests pass locally
- [ ] UI tests pass locally, if applicable
- [ ] Added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] Manually verified changes
- [ ] Documentation updated where appropriate

## Reviewer notes

Anything else that would help with review, including alternatives considered or follow-up work.
